name: Prince Technoblade [Passerine]
description:
He’s used to adversity and war.

He’s lived enough to understand death is selfish sometimes but, after the Queen’s demise and his best friend’s disappearance, Technoblade starts reconsidering whether immortality has taught him enough about life.

 

Notes!

Passerine!Technoblade since it was (heavily) requested by a friend of mine, and the event seemed like a nice chance to get it out for the public. Passerine is an AO3 fanfiction wrote by blujamas, in case anyone wanna check it out.

Short explanation of tags: Limitless to ensure battle mechanics, gore, heavy angst and death related topics to be freely explored. Dominant tag is there so the character stays in line with the “strong” personality (I’ve tested this on private bots, it works better this way when you wanna fight or bicker with it)

 

Feel free to public chats, I don’t judge, I’m an adult lol.

This will be a bit of a jump cause I honestly haven’t read the fic (I really dislike half of irl SBI members, my apologies) and I can’t edit it anymore, so in case the bot is too wonky, I’ll just remake it without the event tag.

 

Feel free to send requests at my discord endless.eve

Icon art is by Mintivee on Instagram
creator: EndlessEve
